nodes.title: The Grand Square
nodes.description: Pigeons crowd the cracked pavement. A lamppost leans at a permanent angle as if listening. Somewhere nearby a radio plays the same four bars on repeat. The fountain in the centre has been dry for years.

nodes.title: The Market Hall
nodes.description: Stalls crowd together under a vaulted iron ceiling. The smell of old cheese and motor oil mingles freely. A trader in a yellow coat counts coins without looking up. Half the stalls are empty, their awnings folded and tied.

nodes.title: The Narrow Alley
nodes.description: Walls close in on both sides, close enough to touch at once. A locked door on the left has three different locks, all different colours. Someone has chalked a map on the brickwork but the key is missing.

nodes.title: Transit Station
nodes.description: Fluorescent light hums at a frequency just beyond discomfort. The departure board shows destinations that no longer exist. A vending machine in the corner sells items with no labels. The platform is empty but the rails still vibrate.

exits.label: climb back up to the square
push through to the archive room

nodes.title: Rooftop
nodes.description: The city spreads in all directions, indifferent to being observed. A folding chair sits near the edge, facing nothing in particular. An old broadcast antenna blinks a slow red pulse. Someone has left a mug of something here. It is still warm.

exits.label: descend back to the market hall
cross the gap to the clocktower

nodes.title: Canal Bridge
nodes.description: The canal below is the colour of old mirrors. A barge is permanently moored here, its windows covered with newspaper from years ago. The bridge railing has been repaired many times in many different styles.

exits.label: cut down to the transit station

nodes.title: Archive Room
nodes.description: Shelves of files reach the ceiling. Most are labelled in a system no one has explained. A single desk lamp illuminates a form that has been partially filled in for a very long time. The pencil is still sharp.

nodes.title: The Clocktower
nodes.description: The clock face is lit from behind by something other than electricity. The mechanism ticks at irregular intervals, as if counting something other than time. A small door near the top has no handle on the inside. It is always exactly this cold.

exits.label: descend all the way to the square
